positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized celestial botanic arrangement centered composition. Feature detailed bioluminescent flora intertwining with geometric constellations and crescent moons. Use strong silhouette art combined with vibrant, glowing accents (teal, royal purple, and warm gold). The style should be neo-Art Deco tattoo flash meets minimalist linework. Composition must be highly contrasted, focusing on clean shapes and dramatic negative space, optimized for a repeatable textile print. Flat vector graphic quality, intricate detail, high symmetry, depth of field effect.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, low detail, watermark, text, signature, logo, messy, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, noisy, grain
